name: Catfish Cakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the poached fillets well and pat them dry. Flake the catfish.
2. Mix the flaked catfish with mayonnaise, beaten eggs, salt, pepper, and Worcestershire sauce until combined.
3. Form the mixture into cakes. Smaller cakes hold together better.
4. Dip both sides of each cake in bread crumbs.
5. Melt butter in a skillet over moderate heat.
6. Cook the catfish cakes in the melted butter until they are heated through and lightly browned on both sides.
Yield: 4-6 servings.
